title: Weekly Vessel Valuations Report, December 14 2021
summary:
Main
in Weekly Vessel Valuations Report 14/12/2021
Image reference: 2021-12-14_weekly-vessel-valuations-report-december-14-2021_img1.png
Tanker: Tanker values have softened. VLCC Asian Progress III (306,400 DWT, Aug 2004, Mitsubishi HI) sold to Chinese buyers for USD 27.20 mil, VV value USD 27.96 mil - SS/DD Due. MR2 High Valor (47,000 DWT, Feb 2005, STX Offshore) sold for USD 10.30 mil, VV value USD 9.62 mil - BWTS Fitted.
